Data structures, drivers, system functions, utilities, boot tests, firmware handling, and linker script for STM32F4 Silk platform.

## Folders
- **[board](board/README.md)**: Data structures and configurations for GPIO, buttons, I2C, and display on the STM32F4 Silk platform.
- **[drivers](drivers/README.md)**: Drivers for display, flash, PMIC, button, debug serial, EXTI, GPIO, I2C, peripheral config, system flash, and watchdog.
- **[system](system/README.md)**: Functions and definitions for boot management, error handling, firmware storage, logging, and system resets.
- **[util](util/README.md)**: Macros, encoding, CRC-32, delay functions, conversions, and network utilities for pebble-firmware.

## Files
- **[boot_tests.c](boot_tests.c.md)**: Tests for detecting stuck buttons and broken flash memory during boot.
- **[boot_tests.h](boot_tests.h.md)**: Declares functions to check if a button is stuck or if the flash is broken.
- **[firmware.h](firmware.h.md)**: Defines the firmware base address for the STM32F4 microcontroller.
- **[flash_region.h](flash_region.h.md)**: Defines memory regions for firmware images, including scratch and safe firmware areas.
- **[fw_copy.c](fw_copy.c.md)**: Handles firmware update processes, including validation, erasure, writing, and recovery operations.
- **[fw_copy.h](fw_copy.h.md)**: Functions for checking firmware updates and switching to recovery firmware mode.
- **[git_version.auto.h.in](git_version.auto.h.in.md)**: Header file for defining Git version information with placeholders for timestamp, tag, and version details.
- **[hardfault_handler.c](hardfault_handler.c.md)**: Handles hard faults by logging the event and triggering a system reset or software failure reset.
- **[main.c](main.c.md)**: Bootloader implementation for initializing hardware, handling boot conditions, and transitioning to firmware.
- **[pebble_errors.h](pebble_errors.h.md)**: Defines error codes for firmware and Bluetooth issues in the Pebble firmware platform.
- **[stm32f_flash_boot.ld.in](stm32f_flash_boot.ld.in.md)**: Linker script for STM32F2xx with memory and section definitions for flash boot.
